---
applyTo: 'src/main/java/pokedex/**/*.java'
description: 'Java Coding Standards'
---
Apply these instructions when editing Java source files.

- Use Java 25 language features where appropriate
- Prefer Streams over manual loops when readability improves
- Use final for local variables whenever practical
- Avoid wildcard imports
- Add JavaDoc only for public APIs
- Follow existing package naming conventions
- Keep methods under 50 lines when possible
- Prefer Optional over null returns
